introduction.p1: I am a Software Engineer with a background in Electrical and Electronics Engineering from BITS Pilani and currently pursuing my Master of Computer Science at Texas A&M University (Aug 2024 - May 2026).
introduction.p2: I build scalable systems and automation pipelines—from production-grade C++ and Python tooling to distributed ML inference and key-value storage engines. I am passionate about backend systems, concurrency, and turning complex requirements into reliable, high-performance solutions.

projects.intro: A real-time collaborative whiteboard built to allow multiple users to draw on a shared canvas.

description: Engineered a production-grade C++ DLL exposing stable APIs for hardware communication, employing parallel programming to optimize throughput and enabling scalable automation pipelines for the entire engineering team.

Automated hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) testing workflows with Python and MySQL-backed data persistence, integrating debugging and profiling to enable unattended execution and save 1000+ engineering hours annually.

Designed and deployed a long-running, fault-tolerant test platform (ElectronJS + Django) to schedule and monitor 4000+ hour hardware validation runs with automated job recovery, email-based fault notifications, and task prioritization.
Built CI/CD pipelines and containerized services on OpenShift; refactored codebases for isolated dev/prod MySQL environments.
Initiated and built a secure ReactJS analytics platform to replace vulnerable Excel-based data sharing, safeguarding proprietary FET performance regressions via role-based access control.

Developed and maintained large-scale backend services for content analytics and customer behavior tracking, integrating ML models to support lead generation and user engagement using Oracle CMS and ReactJS.
Built scalable REST APIs backed by Postgres and distributed services to process high-volume content metadata and behavioral signals.
Partnered with product and analytics teams to instrument performance metrics and optimize workflows, eliminating $50K/year in outsourcing costs.
Designed a custom adaptive-bitrate video player using VideoJS for Oracle Media Services, replacing third-party solutions and reducing recurring licensing costs.
Implemented event-driven processing workflows using Kafka for scalable content indexing and asynchronous job execution, applying deep learning techniques to enhance metadata extraction.
Developed an email parser to generate summary reports about the emails the people from the BU received. This innovation saved roughly 140 hours of work on yearly basis.
Developed dashboard and automated report generation for business units to expedite the data consumption. This process saved the company another 200 hours an year.
Researched the automation of analysis of peer banks 10K and 10Q declaration to generate a peer bank performance report.

education.coursework: Algorithms for Big Data, Distributed Systems, Cloud Computing, Parallel Computing
